title: POST /api/agent/tasks — bulk task create with duplicate detection
implementation_notes: This is the PLANNER endpoint — no claim lock, no heartbeat semantics.
TaskProposal = { title: string, priority: 'critical'|'high'|'medium'|'low', boardId: string, columnId?: string, assignee?: string, objective?: string, dependencies?: string[] }
Validation: title required, priority required, boardId required. Return 422 with field errors if invalid.
Duplicate detection: before creating each task, call buildVaultReadModel() and check readModel.tasks for any task where:
If a duplicate is found, skip that task and add it to a 'skipped' list in the response.
For tasks that pass dedup: call createTask() from existing write service (same pattern as tasks.post.ts).
If columnId is not provided, default to the first column of the board (column order: todo → in-progress → review → done).
Return: { created: Array<{id, title}>, skipped: Array<{title, reason: string}>, errors: Array<{title, error}> }
- test: all proposals created when no duplicates
- test: duplicate (matching open task) is skipped, returns in 'skipped' with reason
- test: done/cancelled task with same title is NOT treated as duplicate (can recreate)
- test: partial success (some created, some skipped, some errored)
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/agent/tasks with array creates all non-duplicate tasks and returns created[], skipped[], errors[].
Task with same title as an open (non-done/cancelled) task on same board is skipped with clear reason.
Task with same title as a DONE/CANCELLED task is NOT skipped (can recreate completed work).
bun test passes with no new failures.
completion_summary: Added POST /api/agent/tasks for planner bulk creation with duplicate detection, partial success reporting, and focused tests.
